content.en:
"I've seen Senior Brother Long Hai!"

Ye Tian said politely.

He had already recognized the identity of the True Monarch in front of him, he was a personal disciple of the Master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor a long time ago, he had been cultivating for a long time, and he was now at the peak level of the True Spirit Realm, and he only needed to completely comprehend a Great Dao to perfection, so that he could impact the Great Dao Realm and become a True Ancestor.

And according to what he knew, this Senior Brother Long Hai had killed more than one True Ancestor, and his combat power was very strong, and he also had a high ranking in the chaos, ranking second among the True Monarchs of the Void Heaven One Line.

As for the first True Monarch, he had been training in Chaos a long time ago, and no one could contact him.

"Oh, I didn't expect that Senior Brother Ye Tian also knew about me!"

Long Hai Zhenjun said with some surprise.

"Senior Brother Long Hai is so famous, I have naturally heard of it a long time ago!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Senior brother, many disciples of the Void Heaven have arrived, and we will talk about it slowly in the future, so let's arrange all the senior brothers first!"

Long Hai Zhenjun said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, many True Monarchs were arranged to settle in this area.

Although a single Void Heaven Hall could accommodate so many people, it was too crowded.

And the territory occupied by the Void Heaven Temple is too large, there is no need to squeeze into a Void Heaven Temple.

Thereupon.

In this area, magnificent palaces have fallen on the starry sky continent.

Void Sky One Vein, God of War Tower, Immortal Gate, Mercenary Alliance, Giant Axe City, Pantheon Sect......

Countless True Monarchs of the top great forces have entered the Quasi-Dao Realm, and the army of True Monarchs sent in by each of the top great forces has reached tens of millions, and even hundreds of millions of True Monarchs have been sent in by the top great forces.

Hundreds of millions of true monarchs have entered the quasi-Dao realm, which seems to be a lot, but they still can't make any waves.

And the list of true monarchs on the ancestral monument was all replaced in an instant, and all the true monarchs who were previously on the list of true monarchs disappeared and were replaced by another batch of true monarchs.

Each of these True Monarchs has been at the extreme of the True Monarch for countless years, and all of them have the record of killing the True Ancestor.

......

Void Heaven Temple.

After many True Monarchs settled down, Ye Tian finally had time to chat alone with Longhai True Monarch.

"Little junior brother, before entering the Quasi-Dao Realm this time, Master Zun mentioned you to me, but he praised you many times!"

Long Hai Zhenjun said with a smile.

"Senior Brother Long Hai is powerful, ranking eighteenth on the True Monarch List, and I am only half a step in the True Spirit Realm!" Ye Tian said modestly.

The two chatted for a while.

Ye Tian suddenly asked, "Senior Brother Long Hai, this time the major forces have sent at least tens of millions of True Monarchs into the Quasi-Dao Realm, why is this? This is almost a small half of the number of True Monarchs of the major top forces!"

Long Hai Zhenjun put away his smile and said solemnly: "Little junior brother, the master didn't reveal too much, but he said that there are many opportunities to enter the quasi-Dao realm, and once this quasi-Dao realm is promoted to the Dao realm, it will surpass other Dao realms." Because of this, the major top forces have sent a lot of True Monarchs in, and even said that once the Dao Realm is completed, there will be a large number of True Ancestors coming in, and the competitiveness is far beyond that of ordinary Dao Realms! According to my speculation, your quasi-Dao Realm is not simple, and there are even things that attract Dao Ancestors!"

"Something that attracts Dao Ancestor?"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

Even the ancestral monument is not attractive to Dao Ancestors, will their future Dao Realm give birth to something that attracts Dao Ancestors?

However, this is very likely, otherwise, the Dao Ancestors would not have personally arranged for the True Monarchs to enter the Quasi-Dao Realm, and they must have discovered something.

"Little junior brother, after a while, the Void Heaven Temple will establish the Void Heaven True Kingdom, and a better territory will be arranged for your human race at that time. Once the True Kingdom is established, it will be more difficult for other forces to invade the True Kingdom, and your Terrans will be safer. And every true monarch will also get a territory at that time, become the lord of the territory, and can use the power of the territory to cultivate and kill enemies. "Longhai Zhenjun said.

"Thank you, Senior Brother Longhai!"

Ye Tian thanked.

He was also very curious about the True Kingdom, knowing that once the True Kingdom was established, it would form a True Kingdom Barrier, isolated from the outside world, as if it had turned into a new world.

Therefore, there are only benefits and no disadvantages to the establishment of a true kingdom.

And in the true country, any living being enjoys luck, the stronger the strength, the more luck you enjoy, once you become a true ancestor, you can also use the true country to contact the ancestral monument, and you are eligible to compete for the ancestral monument for the place.

Ye Tian didn't dare to be interested in the number of ancestral monuments, but if the real kingdom was established, the Terrans would gain the territory and have the protection of the territory, and there would be almost no more books like the previous incident of zero attacks on the Terrans.

In the days that followed, the Void Heaven Temple began to get busy, working hard to build the true kingdom.

Building a true kingdom requires not only a true core, but also countless resources and materials.

Longhai Zhenjun and the others brought the core of the True Kingdom and a lot of materials, but they still lacked some resources in the Quasi-Dao Realm, that is, some innate origin things in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

The innate origin of the Quasi-Dao Realm is an indispensable part, otherwise it would be difficult to form a true true realm.

Not only are the countless True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall collecting the things of the Innate Origin, but other forces are also collecting the things of the Innate Origin.

If it was in the past, innate origin things might be very rare, but today's quasi-dao realm is not short of innate origin things, and it is easy to find some low-level innate origin things.

The resources here are too abundant, even more abundant than the resources of some Dao realms, and there are many brand new resources that are not available in the outside world, which makes many true monarchs who were originally a little unhappy to enter the quasi-Dao realm overjoyed, and bluntly said that it was not in vain.

In the blink of an eye, decades have passed.

this day.

The Void Heaven Temple has gathered all the materials, tens of millions of true monarchs have worked together to build the true kingdom, and in just a few days, the complete construction of the true kingdom has been successful, if there are not so many people, it will take at least tens of thousands of years to successfully build the true kingdom.

Bang!!!!!

With the Void Heaven Temple as the core, the infinite territory suddenly condensed into a realm, isolating the other realms.

And the chaotic vitality of this realm continued to converge in the center, turning the area of the Void Heaven Temple into a sea of chaotic vitality, and one palace after another was suspended above the sea of chaotic vitality.

Here, one breath can absorb a huge amount of Chaos Vitality, and if you simply improve your cultivation, you don't even need to use some resources, just relying on Chaos Vitality is enough to quickly improve your cultivation.

Obviously, this place has become a real holy place for cultivation.

As soon as the Void Heaven True Kingdom became one, one true monarch began to divide the territory, because there are too many true kingdoms, even if there are tens of millions of true monarchs, they are not afraid of no territory.

Of course.

The human race occupies too much area, and if it weren't for Ye Tian's noble status, it would be difficult to enjoy so much territory.

Although some True Monarchs were not convinced, under the strong suppression of Longhai True Monarch, other True Monarchs did not dare to refute, allowing Ye Tian to share a large territory with the Terrans.

And Ye Tian also became the lord of a large territory in the Void Heaven True Country, commanding the luck of the entire human race and a part of the True Kingdom.

At this time, with the help of the luck and strength of the true country, he could even exert double his combat power.
